allow: Bash(curl -k -s -o NUL -w "HTTP %{http_code} | connect=%{time_connect}s total=%{time_total}s\\n" --max-time 15 -u admin:P@ss2025 -H "Accept: application/yang-data+json" https://192.168.100.16:443/restconf/data/Cisco-IOS-XE-native:native/hostname)
Bash(curl -k -s -o NUL -w "root /restconf -> HTTP %{http_code} | total=%{time_total}s\\n" --max-time 15 -u admin:P@ss2025 https://192.168.100.16:443/restconf)
Bash(python -c "import requests; print\('RetryError ok:', requests.exceptions.RetryError\); import restconf_client; print\('module import ok'\)")
